concerns.text: T023 implements 'no pre-specified effect size threshold' per spec Constitution, but project Constitution (FR-030) Principle VII explicitly requires 'Pearson correlation coefficient > 0.5' threshold. Tasks must preserve the ratified Constitution, not the spec's contradictory Constitution section.

T008 creates URL verification script, but Constitution Principle II requires citation verification (title-token-overlap ≥ 0.7 against primary source), not just URL reachability. Task does not fully satisfy Constitution Principle II.

FR-004 requires 'report signal magnitude relative to GRACE-FO measurement noise floor (≥ 3σ threshold)' but spec does not define noise-floor calculation method. T023 implements the comparison without addressing the undefined calculation, rendering FR-004 non-testable.

T023 implements no pre-specified effect size threshold, but SC-002 pre-specifies 'p < 0.05 after multiple-testing correction' as success criteria. Tasks must preserve SC-002's p-value threshold while respecting Constitution Principle VII's effect-size guidance.
